title: Ngân Hàng Câu Hỏi Phỏng Vấn Senior
subtitle: Bộ quiz phỏng vấn senior khó, tập trung vào trade-off thiết kế, scaling, reliability, vận hành, hệ phân tán và quyết định nền tảng AI.

questions.question: Vì sao 'make everything async' often a poor default design answer?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì asynchrony adds consistency, debugging, and observability costs that are not always justified.
questions.explanation: Good designs use async where it solves a real problem, not everywhere by default.
questions.question_en: Why is 'make everything async' often a poor default design answer?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao 'make everything async' often a poor default design answer?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because asynchrony adds consistency, debugging, and observability costs that are not always justified.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì asynchrony adds consistency, debugging, and observability costs that are not always justified.
questions.explanation_en: Good designs use async where it solves a real problem, not everywhere by default.
questions.explanation_vi: Good designs use async where it solves a real problem, not everywhere by default.

questions.question: Vì sao monolith vẫn có thể là một lựa chọn thiết kế mạnh?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì simplicity, lower operational overhead, and stronger transactional consistency can outweigh distribution benefits.
questions.explanation: Microservice không tự động vượt trội hơn.
questions.question_en: Why can a monolith still be a strong design choice?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao monolith vẫn có thể là một lựa chọn thiết kế mạnh?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because simplicity, lower operational overhead, and stronger transactional consistency can outweigh distribution benefits.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì simplicity, lower operational overhead, and stronger transactional consistency can outweigh distribution benefits.
questions.explanation_en: Microservices are not automatically superior.
questions.explanation_vi: Microservice không tự động vượt trội hơn.

questions.question: Vì sao dual write ngây thơ vào DB và broker lại nguy hiểm?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì một lần ghi có thể thành công còn lần kia thất bại, gây ra trạng thái không nhất quán.
questions.explanation: Điều này là why patterns like the outbox exist.
questions.question_en: Why is a naive dual write to DB and broker dangerous?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao dual write ngây thơ vào DB và broker lại nguy hiểm?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because one write can succeed while the other fails, causing inconsistency.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì một lần ghi có thể thành công còn lần kia thất bại, gây ra trạng thái không nhất quán.
questions.explanation_en: This is why patterns like the outbox exist.
questions.explanation_vi: Điều này là why patterns like the outbox exist.

questions.question: Vì sao consumers tolerate các message trùng lặp là bắt buộc?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì nhiều hệ thống giao nhận trong thực tế vận hành theo kiểu at-least-once.
questions.explanation: Idempotent consumer design makes retry and replays safer.
questions.question_en: Why must consumers tolerate duplicate messages?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao consumers tolerate các message trùng lặp là bắt buộc?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because many delivery systems are effectively at-least-once in real operations.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì nhiều hệ thống giao nhận trong thực tế vận hành theo kiểu at-least-once.
questions.explanation_en: Idempotent consumer design makes retries and replays safer.
questions.explanation_vi: Idempotent consumer design makes retry and replays safer.

questions.question: Vì sao relying on global ordering in distributed các queue often a trap?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì ordering guarantees are usually scoped by partition or key, not truly global.
questions.explanation: Scaling and partitioning can break naive ordering assumptions.
questions.question_en: Why is relying on global ordering in distributed queues often a trap?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao relying on global ordering in distributed các queue often a trap?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because ordering guarantees are usually scoped by partition or key, not truly global.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì ordering guarantees are usually scoped by partition or key, not truly global.
questions.explanation_en: Scaling and partitioning can break naive ordering assumptions.
questions.explanation_vi: Scaling and partitioning can break naive ordering assumptions.

questions.question: Vì sao fail-fast behavior sometimes better than waiting longer?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì chờ quá lâu có thể chiếm tài nguyên và làm sự bất ổn toàn hệ thống tệ hơn.
questions.explanation: Fast controlled failure can be healthier than resource exhaustion.
questions.question_en: Why is fail-fast behavior sometimes better than waiting longer?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao fail-fast behavior sometimes better than waiting longer?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because long waits can tie up resources and worsen system-wide instability.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì chờ quá lâu có thể chiếm tài nguyên và làm sự bất ổn toàn hệ thống tệ hơn.
questions.explanation_en: Fast controlled failure can be healthier than resource exhaustion.
questions.explanation_vi: Fast controlled failure can be healthier than resource exhaustion.

questions.question: Trap in immediate retry from every caller during a dependency outage là gì?
questions.correct_answer: It can create a cơn bão retry and deepen the outage.
questions.explanation: Backoff, jitter, and circuit breakers exist to control this risk.
questions.question_en: What is the trap in immediate retries from every caller during a dependency outage?
questions.question_vi: Trap in immediate retry from every caller during a dependency outage là gì?
questions.correct_answer_en: It can create a retry storm and deepen the outage.
questions.correct_answer_vi: It can create a cơn bão retry and deepen the outage.
questions.explanation_en: Backoff, jitter, and circuit breakers exist to control this risk.
questions.explanation_vi: Backoff, jitter, and circuit breakers exist to control this risk.

questions.question: Vì sao timeout tuning a business decision as well as a technical one?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì việc chọn timeout ảnh hưởng đồng thời đến tỷ lệ thành công, trải nghiệm người dùng và mức sử dụng tài nguyên.
questions.explanation: There is no universal timeout value independent of product context.
questions.question_en: Why is timeout tuning a business decision as well as a technical one?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao timeout tuning a business decision as well as a technical one?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because timeout choices affect success rate, user experience, and resource usage together.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì việc chọn timeout ảnh hưởng đồng thời đến tỷ lệ thành công, trải nghiệm người dùng và mức sử dụng tài nguyên.
questions.explanation_en: There is no universal timeout value independent of product context.
questions.explanation_vi: There is no universal timeout value independent of product context.

questions.question: Vì sao độ trễ queue and tuổi xử lý often more useful than raw queue depth alone?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì they reflect actual user-visible delay more directly.
questions.explanation: Depth alone can hide whether work is cũ or just bursty.
questions.question_en: Why are queue lag and processing age often more useful than raw queue depth alone?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao độ trễ queue and tuổi xử lý often more useful than raw queue depth alone?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because they reflect actual user-visible delay more directly.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì they reflect actual user-visible delay more directly.
questions.explanation_en: Depth alone can hide whether work is stale or just bursty.
questions.explanation_vi: Depth alone can hide whether work is cũ or just bursty.

questions.question: Vì sao nên dashboards show trends and not only current values?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì trends reveal degradation, spikes, and change over time better than a single snapshot.
questions.explanation: Historical context improves diagnosis and planning.
questions.question_en: Why should dashboards show trends and not only current values?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao nên dashboards show trends and not only current values?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because trends reveal degradation, spikes, and change over time better than a single snapshot.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì trends reveal degradation, spikes, and change over time better than a single snapshot.
questions.explanation_en: Historical context improves diagnosis and planning.
questions.explanation_vi: Historical context improves diagnosis and planning.

questions.question: Vì sao a process đang chạy readiness check sometimes misleading?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì process có thể còn sống nhưng chưa thực sự sẵn sàng phục vụ traffic một cách an toàn.
questions.explanation: Real readiness should reflect traffic safety, not mere existence.
questions.question_en: Why is a process-up readiness check sometimes misleading?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao a process đang chạy readiness check sometimes misleading?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because the process may be alive but not actually ready to serve traffic safely.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì process có thể còn sống nhưng chưa thực sự sẵn sàng phục vụ traffic một cách an toàn.
questions.explanation_en: Real readiness should reflect traffic safety, not mere existence.
questions.explanation_vi: Real readiness should reflect traffic safety, not mere existence.

questions.question: Vì sao rollback planning part of design quality?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì chiến lược thay đổi an toàn quan trọng ngang với chiến lược triển khai ban đầu.
questions.explanation: Production systems are judged by how safely they evolve under failure too.
questions.question_en: Why is rollback planning part of design quality?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao rollback planning part of design quality?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because safe change strategy matters as much as initial deployment strategy.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì chiến lược thay đổi an toàn quan trọng ngang với chiến lược triển khai ban đầu.
questions.explanation_en: Production systems are judged by how safely they evolve under failure too.
questions.explanation_vi: Production systems are judged by how safely they evolve under failure too.

questions.question: Vì sao autoscaling not eliminate capacity planning?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì scaling has delay, upper bounds, downstream constraints, and cost implications.
questions.explanation: Autoscaling helps but does not replace planning.
questions.question_en: Why does autoscaling not eliminate capacity planning?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao autoscaling not eliminate capacity planning?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because scaling has delay, upper bounds, downstream constraints, and cost implications.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì scaling has delay, upper bounds, downstream constraints, and cost implications.
questions.explanation_en: Autoscaling helps but does not replace planning.
questions.explanation_vi: Autoscaling helps but does not replace planning.

questions.question: Vì sao one slow dependency on a synchronous hot path destabilize an entire service có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì it ties request latency and resources to the weakest external component.
questions.explanation: Async workflows, caching, fallbacks, or bounded các timeout may be better.
questions.question_en: Why can one slow dependency on a synchronous hot path destabilize an entire service?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao one slow dependency on a synchronous hot path destabilize an entire service có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because it ties request latency and resources to the weakest external component.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì it ties request latency and resources to the weakest external component.
questions.explanation_en: Async workflows, caching, fallbacks, or bounded timeouts may be better.
questions.explanation_vi: Async workflows, caching, fallbacks, or bounded các timeout may be better.

questions.question: Which is a stronger first step for optimizing a distributed workflow: rewriting code blindly or mapping the latency budget?
questions.correct_answer: Mapping the latency budget is the stronger first step.
questions.explanation: Evidence-driven optimization beats blind rewrites.
questions.question_en: Which is a stronger first step for optimizing a distributed workflow: rewriting code blindly or mapping the latency budget?
questions.question_vi: Which is a stronger first step for optimizing a distributed workflow: rewriting code blindly or mapping the latency budget?
questions.correct_answer_en: Mapping the latency budget is the stronger first step.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Mapping the latency budget is the stronger first step.
questions.explanation_en: Evidence-driven optimization beats blind rewrites.
questions.explanation_vi: Evidence-driven optimization beats blind rewrites.

questions.question: Vì sao p99 latency matter more than average latency in some systems có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì tail behavior strongly affects real user experience and incident risk.
questions.explanation: Averages can hide severe outliers.
questions.question_en: Why can p99 latency matter more than average latency in some systems?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao p99 latency matter more than average latency in some systems có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because tail behavior strongly affects real user experience and incident risk.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì tail behavior strongly affects real user experience and incident risk.
questions.explanation_en: Averages can hide severe outliers.

questions.question: Vì sao defense in depth valuable?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì no single control is perfect and layered controls reduce overall risk.
questions.explanation: Security posture improves when multiple safeguards exist.
questions.question_en: Why is defense in depth valuable?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao defense in depth valuable?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because no single control is perfect and layered controls reduce overall risk.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì no single control is perfect and layered controls reduce overall risk.
questions.explanation_en: Security posture improves when multiple safeguards exist.
questions.explanation_vi: Security posture improves when multiple safeguards exist.

questions.question: Vì sao nên secret rotation be designed before incidents happen?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì compromised or expiring credentials need rapid controlled replacement.
questions.explanation: Rotation readiness is part of operational security.
questions.question_en: Why should secret rotation be designed before incidents happen?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao nên secret rotation be designed before incidents happen?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because compromised or expiring credentials need rapid controlled replacement.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì compromised or expiring credentials need rapid controlled replacement.
questions.explanation_en: Rotation readiness is part of operational security.
questions.explanation_vi: Rotation readiness is part of operational security.

questions.question: Vì sao read replicas create subtle product bugs có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì replication lag may violate user expectations like read-after-write consistency.
questions.explanation: Replica strategy must consider freshness-sensitive flows.
questions.question_en: Why can read replicas create subtle product bugs?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao read replicas create subtle product bugs có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because replication lag may violate user expectations like read-after-write consistency.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì replication lag may violate user expectations like read-after-write consistency.
questions.explanation_en: Replica strategy must consider freshness-sensitive flows.
questions.explanation_vi: Replica strategy must consider freshness-sensitive flows.

questions.question: Vì sao eventual consistency not just a technical detail but a product decision?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì temporary inconsistency affects what users see and what guarantees the product can promise.
questions.explanation: Consistency các model shape user experience and business correctness.
questions.question_en: Why is eventual consistency not just a technical detail but a product decision?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao eventual consistency not just a technical detail but a product decision?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because temporary inconsistency affects what users see and what guarantees the product can promise.

questions.explanation_en: Consistency models shape user experience and business correctness.
questions.explanation_vi: Consistency các model shape user experience and business correctness.

questions.question: Vì sao retrieval quality matter as much as model quality in RAG systems có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì weak retrieved context limits what even a strong model can answer correctly.
questions.explanation: Grounding quality is often the real bottleneck.

questions.question: Trap in evaluating an AI system only on curated ideal examples là gì?
questions.correct_answer: It creates an unrealistically optimistic view that may fail on real messy user queries.
questions.explanation: Evaluation should resemble real production inputs.

questions.correct_answer_en: It creates an unrealistically optimistic view that may fail on real messy user queries.

questions.question: Vì sao prompt injection more nguy hiểm in tool-using AI systems?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì bad instructions may trigger harmful actions, not just bad text output.
questions.explanation: Tool-enabled systems raise the stakes of prompt safety.

questions.correct_answer_en: Because bad instructions may trigger harmful actions, not just bad text output.

questions.question: Vì sao caching LLM output by raw prompt text alone be incorrect có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì model version, system prompt, temperature, or tool context may also change the result.

questions.question: Vì sao clear service quyền sở hữu important?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì incidents and changes move faster when responsibilities are unambiguous.
questions.explanation: Shared systems without quyền sở hữu often degrade over time.
questions.question_en: Why is clear service ownership important?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao clear service quyền sở hữu important?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because incidents and changes move faster when responsibilities are unambiguous.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì incidents and changes move faster when responsibilities are unambiguous.
questions.explanation_en: Shared systems without ownership often degrade over time.
questions.explanation_vi: Shared systems without quyền sở hữu often degrade over time.

questions.question: Vì sao tradeoffs central in senior interviews?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì senior decisions are rarely about one universally correct answer.
questions.explanation: Strong answers explain when an option is stronger, cheaper, riskier, or simpler.
questions.question_en: Why are tradeoffs central in senior interviews?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao tradeoffs central in senior interviews?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because senior decisions are rarely about one universally correct answer.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì senior decisions are rarely about one universally correct answer.
questions.explanation_en: Strong answers explain when an option is stronger, cheaper, riskier, or simpler.
questions.explanation_vi: Strong answers explain when an option is stronger, cheaper, riskier, or simpler.

questions.question: Vì sao nên you explicitly state assumptions in system design interviews?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì requirements are often incomplete and assumptions shape the tính đúng đắn of the design.
questions.explanation: Clarifying assumptions demonstrates structured thinking.
questions.question_en: Why should you explicitly state assumptions in system design interviews?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao nên you explicitly state assumptions in system design interviews?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because requirements are often incomplete and assumptions shape the correctness of the design.

questions.question: Vì sao mentioning failure modes a strong senior-level interview signal?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì mature engineers design beyond the happy path.
questions.explanation: Production quality is heavily defined by behavior under stress and failure.
questions.question_en: Why is mentioning failure modes a strong senior-level interview signal?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao mentioning failure modes a strong senior-level interview signal?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because mature engineers design beyond the happy path.

questions.explanation_en: Production quality is heavily defined by behavior under stress and failure.

questions.question: Vì sao consistent hashing useful in large distributed systems?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì it reduces data reshuffling when nodes are added or removed.
questions.explanation: Điều này giúp scaling and rebalancing behave more smoothly.
questions.question_en: Why is consistent hashing useful in large distributed systems?

questions.explanation_en: This helps scaling and rebalancing behave more smoothly.

questions.question: Vì sao load balancers important beyond simply splitting traffic evenly?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì they improve reliability, failover behavior, and overall system availability under load.
questions.explanation: Load balancing is not just round-robin distribution; it is a core resilience control.
questions.question_en: Why are load balancers important beyond simply splitting traffic evenly?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao load balancers important beyond simply splitting traffic evenly?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because they improve reliability, failover behavior, and overall system availability under load.

questions.question: Vì sao eventual consistency acceptable in some systems but not others?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì the business cost of temporary cũ data varies by domain.
questions.explanation: Social feed tolerates more độ cũ dữ liệu than a banking ledger.
questions.question_en: Why is eventual consistency acceptable in some systems but not others?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao eventual consistency acceptable in some systems but not others?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because the business cost of temporary stale data varies by domain.

questions.explanation_en: A social feed tolerates more staleness than a banking ledger.
questions.explanation_vi: Social feed tolerates more độ cũ dữ liệu than a banking ledger.

questions.question: Vì sao partition tolerance force hard tradeoffs in distributed systems có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì network partitions are possible, so systems must often prioritize consistency or availability under failure.
questions.explanation: Điều này là the practical heart of CAP-style tradeoff discussions.
questions.question_en: Why can partition tolerance force hard tradeoffs in distributed systems?

questions.correct_answer_en: Because network partitions are possible, so systems must often prioritize consistency or availability under failure.

questions.explanation_en: This is the practical heart of CAP-style tradeoff discussions.
questions.explanation_vi: Điều này là the practical heart of CAP-style tradeoff discussions.

questions.question: Vì sao a circuit breaker not just a retry setting?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì it changes the system's failure posture by stopping các lời gọi proactively instead of merely retrying them.
questions.explanation: It protects resources by failing fast when a dependency is unhealthy.
questions.question_en: Why is a circuit breaker not just a retry setting?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao a circuit breaker not just a retry setting?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because it changes the system's failure posture by stopping calls proactively instead of merely retrying them.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì it changes the system's failure posture by stopping các lời gọi proactively instead of merely retrying them.
questions.explanation_en: It protects resources by failing fast when a dependency is unhealthy.
questions.explanation_vi: It protects resources by failing fast when a dependency is unhealthy.

questions.question: Vì sao graceful degradation often better than a total hard failure?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì partial service may preserve important user outcomes when full functionality is unavailable.
questions.explanation: Reduced experience can be operationally better than full outage.
questions.question_en: Why is graceful degradation often better than a total hard failure?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao graceful degradation often better than a total hard failure?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because partial service may preserve important user outcomes when full functionality is unavailable.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì partial service may preserve important user outcomes when full functionality is unavailable.
questions.explanation_en: A reduced experience can be operationally better than full outage.
questions.explanation_vi: Reduced experience can be operationally better than full outage.

questions.question: Vì sao correlation ids valuable in multi-service request paths?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì they connect log and events across components for one logical request.
questions.explanation: Điều này là essential for diagnosing distributed latency or failure chains.
questions.question_en: Why are correlation ids valuable in multi-service request paths?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao correlation ids valuable in multi-service request paths?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because they connect logs and events across components for one logical request.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì they connect log and events across components for one logical request.
questions.explanation_en: This is essential for diagnosing distributed latency or failure chains.
questions.explanation_vi: Điều này là essential for diagnosing distributed latency or failure chains.

questions.question: Vì sao canary or blue-green triển khai be stronger than instant full rollout có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì they reduce blast radius and provide earlier feedback on regressions.
questions.explanation: Safer rollout strategy is a core production engineering capability.
questions.question_en: Why can canary or blue-green deployment be stronger than instant full rollout?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao canary or blue-green triển khai be stronger than instant full rollout có thể xảy ra?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because they reduce blast radius and provide earlier feedback on regressions.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì they reduce blast radius and provide earlier feedback on regressions.
questions.explanation_en: Safer rollout strategy is a core production engineering capability.
questions.explanation_vi: Safer rollout strategy is a core production engineering capability.

questions.question: Vì sao nên AI systems be evaluated across quality, latency, and cost instead of one score alone?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì khả năng vận hành được trong production phụ thuộc vào nhiều ràng buộc cạnh tranh lẫn nhau.
questions.explanation: Model có chất lượng cao nhất vẫn có thể không chấp nhận được nếu nó quá chậm hoặc quá đắt.
questions.question_en: Why should AI systems be evaluated across quality, latency, and cost instead of one score alone?
questions.question_vi: Vì sao nên AI systems be evaluated across quality, latency, and cost instead of one score alone?
questions.correct_answer_en: Because production viability depends on multiple competing constraints.
questions.correct_answer_vi: Bởi vì khả năng vận hành được trong production phụ thuộc vào nhiều ràng buộc cạnh tranh lẫn nhau.
questions.explanation_en: The highest-quality model may still be unacceptable if it is too slow or too expensive.
questions.explanation_vi: Model có chất lượng cao nhất vẫn có thể không chấp nhận được nếu nó quá chậm hoặc quá đắt.

questions.question: Vì sao quyền sở hữu clarity especially important when many các service interact?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì incidents, migrations, and changes become slower and riskier when responsibility is ambiguous.
questions.explanation: Clear quyền sở hữu improves operational response and system evolution.

questions.question: Vì sao it a strong senior answer to discuss what you would deliberately not build yet?
questions.correct_answer: Bởi vì senior judgment includes knowing when complexity is not justified.
questions.explanation: Good design is often about omission and sequencing, not maximal architecture.
